title: EQ - Changed custom EQ, not saved, exit/return to EQ, changes are present
scenario: Unsaved custom EQ changes persist after exiting and returning to the EQ screen instead of being discarded
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Modify one or more custom EQ band sliders (do not tap Save)
Exit the EQ screen by tapping the back arrow (←) to return to Audio Settings
Observe the EQ band slider positions
expected: Unsaved custom EQ changes should be discarded. The EQ sliders should return to their previously saved state (or default flat settings if no custom preset was saved).
